# HPD.ML.Abstractions.ISchema

- Package: `HPD-ML-Abstractions` `0.5.0`
- Assembly: `HPD.ML.Abstractions`
- Namespace: `HPD.ML.Abstractions`

Immutable description of named, typed, annotated columns with explicit composition semantics and refinement levels.

Schema inference from POCOs uses source generators (no reflection) for Native AOT compatibility.
